description_long: This is a modern grave site set on a rectangular paved plot, featuring a prominent black granite headstone with a polished finish and a carved cross on the left side. The headstone is mounted on a raised, light gray stone base that extends to form a platform, likely made of marble or granite. In front of the grave are three black cubic blocks, each topped with a white circular element, possibly representing candle holders or flower vases. The paved area surrounding the grave is composed of small, uniformly arranged gray tiles, providing a neat and respectful setting. The headstone bears inscriptions including a name, dates, and an epitaph, all engraved in white. The overall design is minimalist yet dignified, with a strong contrast between the dark and light stone elements.
description: A modern grave site with a black granite headstone, gray stone base, and three black cubic blocks with white tops on a tiled platform.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black headstone, gray stone base, and three black cubic blocks with white tops aligned in front.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the depth of the gray stone base and the alignment of the three black blocks.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the engraved headstone with a cross, inscriptions, and the three black blocks with white tops in front.
description_view_3: View from behind the grave, focusing on the tops of the three black blocks and the expanse of the gray stone base.
